name: formatDate
description: Locale-aware date formatting. Formats a date value using the browser's Intl.DateTimeFormat API, supporting dynamic values bound to the data model.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve the date value dynamically.

value.description: The date value to format. Can be a literal string (ISO 8601) or a DynamicString referencing a data model path.

locale.description: A BCP 47 language tag (e.g., 'en-US', 'de-DE'). If omitted, the browser's default locale is used.

targetPath.description: Optional data model path to write the formatted result to.
